title: syntherisma mollis
intro: Syntherisma mollis is a plant species, also known as the soft thread fern, which belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Syntherisma mollis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Syntherisma mollis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's extract in capsule form, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
